datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.intro: Protecting your personal data is important to us.
datenschutz.collection_text: This website does not collect personal data beyond server logs.
datenschutz.cookies_text: This website does not use cookies.
datenschutz.hosting_text: This website is hosted on Vercel (Vercel Inc., USA). More information at vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy.
datenschutz.rights_text: You have the right to access, correct, and delete your data. Contact: hello@yourdomain.com
